name: mymoe-local-cascade
description: Delegate bounded Codex work to strictly configured local models.

interface.shortDescription: Route bounded work to local AI models.
interface.longDescription: Inspect local capabilities, plan configuration-bound delegation, run verified task types on local models, and inspect metadata-only receipts.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this machine and plan a bounded local task.
Delegate this simple task to a configured local model.
